key_themes: AI硬件与半导体的结构增长
共封装光学与上游激光瓶颈
市场恐慌中的逆周期信念
数据中心和AI基础设施需求
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期观点强化了市场下跌主要源于杠杆清算和误读，而非基本面变化，对持仓主题的信心未动摇。
representative_quotes: My portfolio is mainly AI chokepoints and bottlenecks... I see a lot of people making fun of the drop... But I have conviction that all these themes are backed by structural revenue growth or technological shifts.
I think current market conditions are a reflection of liquidity and leverage, not individual fundamentals.
If your long term thesis hasn't changed… Close your brokerage app. Go live your life.

key_themes: 科技与AI推动市场结构性变化
unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期言论更多关注地缘冲突和消费弱化，相较此前科技乐观基调转向谨慎。
representative_quotes: Fed's Hammack: Inflation is too high. The labor market is right around my level of maximum employment.
Warren Buffett: "Tough to find value" when everyone is gambling
Fed's Logan: Inflation does not appear to be heading sustainably back to 2% on its own.

key_themes: 存储芯片长期需求，特别是HBM和SK海力士
AI基础设施投资与扩产周期
康宁玻璃基板在下一代芯片中的关键作用
xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从分散关注转向高度聚焦康宁和存储，并强调短期暴跌是上车机会，体现从防御到积极抄底的转变。
representative_quotes: 跌成这逼样，再跌巴菲特得把几千亿美金梭哈了。
全网现在都是清仓的，看空的，做空的。怎么能让你们所有人都对呢，意见越统一的时候傻逼越多。
康宁 $GLW 正式称将按照老黄的要求扩产10倍，这意味着业绩也要10倍。
